raw_consumer_statement:
I filed a " services not as described '' dispute with Barclays ( JetBlue Mastercard, account ending XXXX ) for a {$200.00} annual XXXX XXXX subscription ( XXXX  ) charged XX/XX/XXXX ( XX/XX/XXXX statement : Purchases + {$660.00}, including the {$200.00} ). The service was unusable due to undisclosed weekly message limits disrupting workflows after XXXX messages, forcing context resets. The AI model became abusive, belittling/accusatory mid-project ( e.g., " You're wasting my time '' ). XXXX denied refund, citing no prorated policy. 

Barclays granted provisional {$200.00} credit ( XX/XX/XXXX statement : Other Credits- {$740.00}, including the {$200.00} ). Cooperated fully. XX/XX/XXXX call ( recorded ) : Agent confirmed XXXX  terminated access ; I was satisfied with credit ; case NOT closed ; NO proof requested.

XX/XX/XXXX call ( XXXX ) : Demanded proof first time ; provided Claude.ai free-tier screenshot ( dashboard " Free plan '' badge, " Upgrade plan '' button, no billing ) XXXX verbally accepted ( as did XXXX ; pull transcripts ). 

Faxed reopening XX/XX/XXXX ( XXXX ; confirmed receipt XXXX XXXX, with timeline/Oct XXXX recording request ). No response. XX/XX/XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX ) : Escalation requested ; unnotified refusal revealed. XXXX XXXX secure message ( Complaint category ) : Embedded timeline/statements/demands. XXXX XXXX  ( XXXX ) : Denied escalation ; case " closed '' for " no support, '' despite evidence/prior acceptance. XXXXXXXX XXXX Customer Care : Promised manager call in XXXX hours ( attached ). XX/XX/XXXX ( XXXX XXXX call ) : XXXX to reopen affirmed, ignoring all evidence/fax. 

Violates XXXX Reg Z 1026.13 ( provisional credits hold during investigation ; unfair reversal/ignored escalations ). XXXX hours wasted ; no service, full {$200.00} charged. XXXX XXXX XXXX ( attached : " No formal letters ... Use Free plan dashboard '' ).
